creator: garga@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to freebsd from comment #0)
port doesn't build with following error:

(cd /usr/home/garga/work/freebsd/ports/devel/misc/corso/work/src/corso;  for t in corso; do  out=$(/usr/bin/basename $(echo ${t} |  /usr/bin/sed -Ee 's/^[^:]*:([^:]+).*$/\1/' -e 's/^\.$/corso/'));  pkg=$(echo ${t} |  /usr/bin/sed -Ee 's/^([^:]*).*$/\1/' -e 's/^corso$/./');  echo "===>  Building ${out} from ${pkg}";  /usr/bin/env XDG_DATA_HOME=/usr/home/garga/work/freebsd/ports/devel/misc/corso/work  XDG_CONFIG_HOME=/usr/home/garga/work/freebsd/ports/devel/misc/corso/work  XDG_CACHE_HOME=/usr/home/garga/work/freebsd/ports/devel/misc/corso/work/.cache  HOME=/usr/home/garga/work/freebsd/ports/devel/misc/corso/work PATH=/usr/home/garga/work/freebsd/ports/devel/misc/corso/work/.bin:/home/garga/bin:/usr/local/bin:/usr/local/sbin:/sbin:/bin:/usr/sbin:/usr/bin:/home/garga/.local/bin PKG_CONFIG_LIBDIR=/usr/home/garga/work/freebsd/ports/devel/misc/corso/work/.pkgconfig:/usr/local/libdata/pkgconfig:/usr/local/share/pkgconfig:/usr/libdata/pkgconfig MK_DEBUG_FILES=no MK_KERNEL_SYMBOLS=no SHELL=/bin/sh NO_LINT=YES PREFIX=/usr/local  LOCALBASE=/usr/local  CC="cc" CFLAGS="-O2 -pipe  -fstack-protector-strong -fno-strict-aliasing "  CPP="cpp" CPPFLAGS=""  LDFLAGS=" -fstack-protector-strong " LIBS=""  CXX="c++" CXXFLAGS="-O2 -pipe -fstack-protector-strong -fno-strict-aliasing  "  MANPREFIX="/usr/local" BSD_INSTALL_PROGRAM="install  -s -m 555"  BSD_INSTALL_LIB="install  -s -m 0644"  BSD_INSTALL_SCRIPT="install  -m 555"  BSD_INSTALL_DATA="install  -m 0644"  BSD_INSTALL_MAN="install  -m 444" CGO_ENABLED=1  CGO_CFLAGS="-I/usr/local/include"  CGO_LDFLAGS="-L/usr/local/lib"  GOAMD64=  GOARM=  GOTMPDIR="/usr/home/garga/work/freebsd/ports/devel/misc/corso/work" GOPATH="/usr/home/garga/work/freebsd/ports/devel/misc/corso/work"  GOBIN=""  GO111MODULE=off GOMAXPROCS=12 GOPROXY=off /usr/local/bin/go120 build -buildmode=exe -v -trimpath -ldflags=-s -buildvcs=false  -o /usr/home/garga/work/freebsd/ports/devel/misc/corso/work/bin/${out}  ${pkg};  done)
===>  Building corso from .
corso.go:4:2: cannot find package "github.com/alcionai/corso/src/cli" in any of:
        /usr/local/go120/src/github.com/alcionai/corso/src/cli (from $GOROOT)
        /usr/home/garga/work/freebsd/ports/devel/misc/corso/work/src/github.com/alcionai/corso/src/cli (from $GOPATH)
